/soft/compilers/cuda/cuda-12.3.0/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -lineinfo -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_90,code=[compute_90,sm_90]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/streamOrderedAllocationP2P.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/streamOrderedAllocationP2P.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/streamOrderedAllocationP2P.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
